children.name: ai.mcfunction
children.content:
execute as @e[type=marker,tag=at.bubbls] if score @s ai matches 1 at @s rotated as @p run tp @s ~ ~ ~ ~ ~

## преследование
$execute as @e[type=marker,tag=at.bubbls,tag=red] if score @s ai matches 1.. at @s positioned ^ ^ ^$(speed) run tp @s ~ ~ ~
$execute as @e[type=marker,tag=at.bubbls,tag=blue] if score @s ai matches 1.. at @s positioned ^ ^ ^$(speed) run tp @s ~ ~ ~
## партиклы
execute as @e[type=marker,tag=at.bubbls] if score @s ai matches 2.. at @s run particle bubble ~ ~ ~ 0.1 0.1 0.1 0 20
execute as @e[type=marker,tag=at.bubbls] if score @s ai matches 2.. at @s run particle bubble ^ ^ ^-0.05 0.1 0.1 0.1 0 20

## добавить счёт
execute as @e[type=marker,tag=at.bubbls] run scoreboard players add @s ai 1

## Нанести урон
execute as @e[type=marker,tag=at.bubbls,tag=red] at @s positioned ~ ~-1.5 ~ if entity @p[distance=..1,team=blue] run function ag001:abillity/attack/bubbls/damage/blue with storage config attacks.bubbls.shells
execute as @e[type=marker,tag=at.bubbls,tag=blue] at @s positioned ~ ~-1.5 ~ if entity @p[distance=..1,team=red] run function ag001:abillity/attack/bubbls/damage/red with storage config attacks.bubbls.shells

## остальное
$execute as @e[type=marker,tag=at.bubbls] if score @s ai matches ..$(live) run schedule function ag001:abillity/attack/bubbls/ai_scheule_bypass 1t
$execute as @e[type=marker,tag=at.bubbls] if score @s ai matches $(live).. run function ag001:abillity/attack/bubbls/ai_end

children.content:
execute if score @s attack.check matches 1 run function ag001:abillity/attack/swing/start
$execute if entity @s[team=red] if score @s attack.check matches 1..$(recharge1) if block ~ ~-1 ~ #air if block ^1 ^1.5 ^1 #air if block ^-1 ^1.5 ^1 #air if block ^ ^1.5 ^1 #air unless entity @p[tag=!in.swing,distance=..1,team=blue] run tp @s ^ ^ ^$(distance3ng)
$execute if score @s[team=red] attack.check matches 1..$(recharge1) unless block ~ ~-1 ~ #air if block ^1 ^1.5 ^1 #air if block ^-1 ^1.5 ^1 #air if block ^ ^1.5 ^1 #air unless entity @p[tag=!in.swing,distance=..1,team=blue] rotated ~ 0 run tp @s ^ ^ ^$(distance3)

$execute if entity @s[team=blue] if score @s attack.check matches 1..$(recharge1) if block ~ ~-1 ~ #air if block ^1 ^1.5 ^1 #air if block ^-1 ^1.5 ^1 #air if block ^ ^1.5 ^1 #air unless entity @p[tag=!in.swing,distance=..1,team=red] run tp @s ^ ^ ^$(distance3ng)
$execute if score @s[team=blue] attack.check matches 1..$(recharge1) unless block ~ ~-1 ~ #air if block ^1 ^1.5 ^1 #air if block ^-1 ^1.5 ^1 #air if block ^ ^1.5 ^1 #air unless entity @p[tag=!in.swing,distance=..1,team=red] rotated ~ 0 run tp @s ^ ^ ^$(distance3)

$execute if score @s attack.check matches 1..$(recharge) run tag @s add double.jumped
$execute if score @s attack.check matches 1..$(recharge1) run particle minecraft:sweep_attack ^ ^1.3 ^ 0.1 0.1 0.1 0.1 10
scoreboard players add @s attack.check 1
$execute if score @s attack.check matches 1..$(recharge1) run playsound minecraft:entity.player.attack.sweep
tag @s add in.swing
execute if entity @s[team=red] at @s positioned ~ ~ ~ if entity @p[tag=!in.swing,distance=..1,team=blue] run function ag001:abillity/attack/swing/damage/blue with storage config attacks.swing
execute if entity @s[team=blue] at @s positioned ~ ~ ~ if entity @p[tag=!in.swing,distance=..1,team=red] run function ag001:abillity/attack/swing/damage/red with storage config attacks.swing
tag @s remove in.swing

$execute if score @s attack.check matches $(recharge).. run function ag001:abillity/attack/swing/end

children.name: procent_calc.mcfunction
children.content:
execute if score *defuse-time planting matches 1.. run return fail

$scoreboard players set @s consts $(recharge)

scoreboard players operation @s procent.a = @s attack.check
execute if score @s procent.a = 0 consts run scoreboard players operation @s procent.a = @s abillity.darkrun
scoreboard players operation @s procent.a *= 100 consts
scoreboard players operation @s procent.a /= @s consts

scoreboard players add @s animate_hands 1

title @s times 0t 1d 0t
execute if score @s procent.a = 0 consts run title @s title [{translate:"space.-220"},{font:"minecraft:death_ray_scale",text:"\uA001",shadow_color:0}]
execute if score @s procent.a = 10 consts run title @s title [{translate:"space.-220"},{font:"minecraft:death_ray_scale",text:"\uA002",shadow_color:0}]
execute if score @s procent.a = 20 consts run title @s title [{translate:"space.-220"},{font:"minecraft:death_ray_scale",text:"\uA003",shadow_color:0}]
execute if score @s procent.a = 30 consts run title @s title [{translate:"space.-220"},{font:"minecraft:death_ray_scale",text:"\uA004",shadow_color:0}]
execute if score @s procent.a = 40 consts run title @s title [{translate:"space.-220"},{font:"minecraft:death_ray_scale",text:"\uA005",shadow_color:0}]
execute if score @s procent.a = 50 consts run title @s title [{translate:"space.-220"},{font:"minecraft:death_ray_scale",text:"\uA006",shadow_color:0}]
execute if score @s procent.a = 60 consts run title @s title [{translate:"space.-220"},{font:"minecraft:death_ray_scale",text:"\uA007",shadow_color:0}]
execute if score @s procent.a = 70 consts run title @s title [{translate:"space.-220"},{font:"minecraft:death_ray_scale",text:"\uA008",shadow_color:0}]
execute if score @s procent.a = 80 consts run title @s title [{translate:"space.-220"},{font:"minecraft:death_ray_scale",text:"\uA009",shadow_color:0}]
execute if score @s procent.a = 90 consts run title @s title [{translate:"space.-220"},{font:"minecraft:death_ray_scale",text:"\uA010",shadow_color:0}]
execute if score @s procent.a = 100 consts run title @s title [{translate:"space.-220"},{font:"minecraft:death_ray_scale",text:"\uA011",shadow_color:0}]

execute if entity @s[tag=at.bubbls] if score @s animate_hands matches 1 unless score @s abillity.darkrun matches 1.. run item replace entity @s hotbar.5 with minecraft:carrot_on_a_stick[custom_model_data={strings:["bubbls_animate_2"]}]
execute if entity @s[tag=at.bubbls] if score @s animate_hands matches 3 unless score @s abillity.darkrun matches 1.. run item replace entity @s hotbar.5 with minecraft:carrot_on_a_stick[custom_model_data={strings:["bubbls_animate_1"]}]

execute if entity @s[tag=at.swing] if score @s animate_hands matches 1 unless score @s abillity.darkrun matches 1.. run item replace entity @s hotbar.5 with minecraft:carrot_on_a_stick[custom_model_data={strings:["swing_animate_1"]}]
execute if entity @s[tag=at.swing] if score @s animate_hands matches 2 unless score @s abillity.darkrun matches 1.. run item replace entity @s hotbar.5 with minecraft:carrot_on_a_stick[custom_model_data={strings:["swing_animate_2"]}]
execute if entity @s[tag=at.swing] if score @s animate_hands matches 3 unless score @s abillity.darkrun matches 1.. run item replace entity @s hotbar.5 with minecraft:carrot_on_a_stick[custom_model_data={strings:["swing_animate_1"]}]
execute if entity @s[tag=at.swing] if score @s animate_hands matches 4 unless score @s abillity.darkrun matches 1.. run item replace entity @s hotbar.5 with minecraft:carrot_on_a_stick[custom_model_data={strings:["swing_animate_0"]}]

execute if score @s procent.a = 100 consts run scoreboard players reset @s animate_hands

children.content:
## преследование

execute as @e[type=marker,tag=ult.electricball,tag=red] at @s positioned ^ ^ ^1 rotated as @p[team=red] if score @s ai matches ..5 run tp @s ~ ~ ~ ~ ~
execute as @e[type=marker,tag=ult.electricball,tag=blue] at @s positioned ^ ^ ^1 rotated as @p[team=blue] if score @s ai matches ..5 run tp @s ~ ~ ~
$execute as @e[type=marker,tag=ult.electricball,tag=red] at @s positioned ^ ^ ^$(speed) run tp @s ~ ~ ~ facing entity @p[team=blue] eyes
$execute as @e[type=marker,tag=ult.electricball,tag=blue] at @s positioned ^ ^ ^$(speed) run tp @s ~ ~ ~ facing entity @p[team=red] eyes

## партиклы
execute as @e[type=marker,tag=ult.electricball] at @s run particle end_rod ~ ~ ~ 0.25 0.25 0.25 0 6
execute as @e[type=marker,tag=ult.electricball] at @s run particle electric_spark ~ ~ ~ 0.4 0.4 0.4 0 35

## добавить счёт
execute as @e[type=marker,tag=ult.electricball] run scoreboard players add @s ai 1

## Нанести урон
execute as @e[type=marker,tag=ult.electricball,tag=red] at @s positioned ~ ~-1.5 ~ if entity @p[distance=..3,team=blue] run function ag001:abillity/ultimate/electricball/damage/blue with storage config ultimate.electricball

## остальное
$execute as @e[type=marker,tag=ult.electricball] if score @s ai matches ..$(live) run schedule function ag001:abillity/ultimate/electricball/ai_scheule_bypass 1t
$execute as @e[type=marker,tag=ult.electricball] if score @s ai matches $(live).. run function ag001:abillity/ultimate/electricball/ai_end
